## hermes --version
Hermes Agent v0.12.0 (2026.4.30)
Project: /usr/local/lib/hermes-agent
Python: 3.11.15
OpenAI SDK: 2.32.0
Up to date

## hermes mcp list

  MCP Servers:

  Name             Transport                      Tools        Status    
  ──────────────── ────────────────────────────── ──────────── ──────────
  memory           ai-memory --db /var/lib/a...   all          ✓ enabled


## /root/.hermes/config.yaml (sha256 + head)
889c475f0926686ffdc3827accbd19cba3d820a90c5ae908eb1ac33f71eb0098  /root/.hermes/config.yaml
# Nous Research Hermes Agent — ai-memory-ai2ai-gate
# Generated by scripts/setup_node.sh for agent_id=ai:bob

mcp_servers:
  memory:
    command: ai-memory
    args:
      - "--db"
      - "/var/lib/ai-memory/a2a.db"
      - "mcp"
      - "--tier"
      - "semantic"
    env:
      AI_MEMORY_AGENT_ID: "ai:bob"
    enabled: true

# A2A channel lock-down — alternative communication paths must be OFF
# for the shared-memory A2A thesis to be falsifiable.
acp:
  enabled: false

messaging:
  gateway_enabled: false
  platforms:
    telegram: { enabled: false }
    discord:  { enabled: false }
    slack:    { enabled: false }

execution_backends: []

mcp_server_mode: false     # Hermes is MCP client of ai-memory, NOT an MCP server itself
subagent_delegation: false # no spawn_subagent — forces all coordination through memory

# tool_allowlist holds the EXACT tool ids hermes-agent exposes to the
# LLM. Per hermes_cli/mcp_tools.py the dispatcher namespaces stdio MCP
# tools as mcp_<server-name>_<bare-tool-name>; the allowlist filter
# matches those namespaced ids. We list both forms so this config is
# robust to a future upstream change in filter ordering.
tool_allowlist:
  - mcp_memory_memory_store
  - mcp_memory_memory_recall
  - mcp_memory_memory_list
  - mcp_memory_memory_get
  - mcp_memory_memory_share
  - mcp_memory_memory_link
  - mcp_memory_memory_update
  - mcp_memory_memory_detect_contradiction
  - mcp_memory_memory_consolidate
  - memory_store
  - memory_recall
  - memory_list
  - memory_get
  - memory_share
  - memory_link
  - memory_update
  - memory_detect_contradiction
  - memory_consolidate

a2a_gate_profile: shared-memory-only
a2a_gate_profile_version: "1.0.0"

## tool catalog dry-probe (hermes -z list-available-tools)
